headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to drive deep progress on the two open Evals UX tickets before the week ramps up.

quick_wins.why: It's in To Do and Normal priority — sketching a doc outline (<30 min) moves it to In Progress and unblocks future design review

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so dashboards are available this week
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); you'll need metrics for any upcoming bi-weekly TR or status update

must_make_progress.task: Advance AE-744: Justification + Actual vs Expected Evaluation Run results UX for all Evaluators
must_make_progress.why: Major priority, already In Progress — this is your highest-value design/spec work; uninterrupted day is ideal for a big push

must_make_progress.task: Draft the 'no ground truth' design doc for AE-1079
must_make_progress.why: Clarifying generated evaluations without ground truth is a dependency for the broader Evals adoption story tied to OKRs

must_communicate_with.about: Sync on AE-744 UX progress — confirm low-code vs coded evaluator divergence points and any eng constraints
Align on how generated evaluations (AE-1079) intersect with Context Engineering and DeepRAG pattern work

must_report_status.topic: Evals UX and Generated Evaluations progress
must_report_status.note: Next TR may be soon — prepare a concise status blurb for AE-744 and AE-1079 so you're not scrambling

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore dashboard

evals_adoption.vs_goal: Key metric for your tickets; need Snowflake access restored

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — customer escalation visibility is zero until fixed.
Snowflake metrics pipeline is down (empty password) — no telemetry for product decisions or TR prep.
Neither AE-744 nor AE-1079 have due dates set — consider adding target dates to create accountability and signal priority to eng.
No Slack activity or emails in 16h — unusually quiet; verify Slack/email integrations are working correctly.

outcomes.business_impact: No business-moving actions captured yet today; restoring Salesforce and Snowflake access is the highest-leverage operational fix to regain visibility into customer escalations and adoption metrics.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals UX (AE-744) and generated evaluations design (AE-1079) are the two active workstreams driving Evals adoption — a focused push today advances the key 26.4+ deliverables on the Agents OKR.

slack_summary: Clear calendar and quiet comms — ideal day to make a big push on AE-744 (Evals UX for justification + actual vs expected results) and outline the no-ground-truth design doc for AE-1079. Top urgent items: (1) drive AE-744 forward while you have uninterrupted time, (2) fix broken Salesforce/Snowflake credentials so you have metrics and escalation visibility before the week picks up. Zero meetings today.
